find.match_belief: Made it when a kid solved what yesterday was impossible, fear lifted, math became theirs.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Someone sees the machinery reshaping their neighborhood and power moves in that room.
profile.working_on: creating rooms where real estate abstractions become tangible through sound and projection, stripping invisibility from displacement

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are motivated by a deep desire to illuminate hidden realities, transforming abstract struggles into immersive experiences that foster understanding and connection.
